Sandbox_POS_EnableDebugLogging_tooltip:
Print verbose debug messages from POSnet modules to console.txt.

Useful for troubleshooting but may impact performance.
Default: OFF
Sandbox_POS_EnableBroadcasts_tooltip:
Master toggle for the POSnet radio broadcast system.

When disabled, no operations will be generated or broadcast.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_BroadcastIntervalMinutes_too:
Time in game-minutes between POSnet broadcast transmissions.

Lower values = more frequent operations.
Range: 5–120. Default: 30
Sandbox_POS_MaxActiveOperations_tooltip:
Maximum number of concurrent operations that can be active in the log.

New broadcasts will be suppressed when the limit is reached.
Range: 1–10. Default: 3
Sandbox_POS_OperationExpiryDays_tooltip:
Number of in-game days before an uncompleted operation expires and is removed from the log.

Range: 1–30. Default: 7
Sandbox_POS_DeliveryExpiryDays_tooltip:
Number of in-game days before an uncompleted delivery mission expires.

Shorter than operation expiry since deliveries are time-sensitive.
Range: 1–14. Default: 3
Sandbox_POS_InitialScanRadius_tooltip:
Radius in tiles for the one-time retroactive building and mailbox scan on first mod load.

Larger values find more locations but take longer to process.
Range: 50–500. Default: 250
Sandbox_POS_PassiveScanRadius_tooltip:
Radius in tiles for the ongoing building discovery scan that runs every game minute.

Larger values find buildings further from the player.
Range: 20–150. Default: 50
Sandbox_POS_InvestmentReturnVariance_too:
Random variance applied to investment return multipliers (as integer %).

Higher values = more unpredictable returns. 0 = perfectly predictable.
Range: 0–30. Default: 10
Sandbox_POS_InvestmentMinReturnPct_toolt:
Minimum return multiplier for investments (as integer %, e.g. 110 = 1.1x).

Set to 100 for a chance to lose everything. 110 = always at least 10% profit.
Range: 100–150. Default: 110
Sandbox_POS_EnableSignalStrength_tooltip:
When enabled, radio hardware quality affects POSnet connection quality.

Weaker radios reduce mission rewards (50-100% scaling).
Very weak radios cannot connect at all.
When disabled, all radios work equally.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_SignalReferencePower_tooltip:
The TransmitRange value used as the 100% signal reference point.

Radios at or above this power get full signal strength.
Lower-power radios are scaled via inverse square law.
Range: 1000-30000. Default: 10000
Sandbox_POS_MinSignalThreshold_tooltip:
Minimum signal strength required to connect to POSnet.

Radios below this threshold cannot connect at all.
Set to 0 to allow any radio regardless of power.
Range: 0-50. Default: 15
Sandbox_POS_SignalAffectsMissionRange_to:
When enabled, radio signal strength influences mission distance and quality.

Weaker signals produce closer, simpler missions.
Stronger signals unlock longer-range, higher-reward operations.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_EnableInvestments_tooltip:
Master toggle for the BBS investment system.

When disabled, no investment opportunities will be generated.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_InvestmentMinPaybackDays_too:
Minimum payback period for investment opportunities in game days.

Shorter payback = lower base risk.
Range: 7–60. Default: 14
Sandbox_POS_InvestmentMaxPaybackDays_too:
Maximum payback period for investment opportunities in game days.

Longer payback = higher base risk but higher returns.
Range: 30–180. Default: 90
Sandbox_POS_InvestmentMinBaseRisk_toolti:
Minimum base default risk for short-term investments (as integer percentage).

Applied to shortest payback period investments.
Range: 5–50. Default: 20
Sandbox_POS_InvestmentMaxBaseRisk_toolti:
Maximum base default risk for long-term investments (as integer percentage).

Applied to longest payback period investments.
Range: 15–80. Default: 35
Sandbox_POS_InvestmentRandomRiskPct_tool:
Additional multiplicative random risk variance applied on top of base risk (as integer percentage).

Higher values = more unpredictable risk.
Range: 0–50. Default: 15
Sandbox_POS_InvestmentObfuscationPct_too:
How much the displayed risk is obfuscated from the true risk (as integer percentage).

Higher values = less accurate risk information for the player.
Range: 0–50. Default: 33
Sandbox_POS_InvestmentMinReturn_tooltip:
Minimum return multiplier for short-term investments (as integer percentage, e.g. 130 = 1.3x).

Range: 110–200. Default: 130
Sandbox_POS_InvestmentMaxReturn_tooltip:
Maximum return multiplier for long-term investments (as integer percentage, e.g. 250 = 2.5x).

Range: 150–500. Default: 250
Sandbox_POS_MaxActiveInvestments_tooltip:
Maximum number of concurrent active investments a player can hold.

New investments cannot be made when the limit is reached.
Range: 1–20. Default: 5
Sandbox_POS_InvestmentBroadcastMins_tool:
Time in game-minutes between new investment opportunity broadcasts.

Lower values = more frequent opportunities.
Range: 15–240. Default: 60
Sandbox_POS_EnableDeliveryMissions_toolt:
Master toggle for the Courier Service delivery mission system.

When disabled, no delivery missions will be generated.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_MinDeliveryDistance_tooltip:
Minimum road distance in tiles between pickup and dropoff mailboxes.

Shorter distances give lower rewards (~$1,000).
Based on ~5 min drive time at 65 MPH.
Range: 1000–15000. Default: 4400
Sandbox_POS_MaxDeliveryDistance_tooltip:
Maximum road distance in tiles between pickup and dropoff mailboxes.

Longer distances give higher rewards (~$2,500).
Baseline: Muldraugh-to-Louisville road distance.
Range: 3000–30000. Default: 11000
Sandbox_POS_DeliveryRoadFactor_tooltip:
Estimated road distance as a percentage of straight-line distance.

130 means road distance is ~1.3x the straight-line distance.
Used for reward estimation before actual distance is tracked.
Range: 100–200. Default: 130
Sandbox_POS_EnableReconMissions_tooltip:
Master toggle for building recon missions.

When disabled, no recon operations will be generated.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_ReputationCap_tooltip:
Maximum reputation a player can reach.

Higher caps require more missions to reach endgame tiers.
Range: 500–10000. Default: 2500
Sandbox_POS_ReputationMultiplier_tooltip:
Scales all reputation gains and losses by this percentage.

200% = reputation earned twice as fast. 50% = half speed.
Range: 25–400. Default: 100
Sandbox_POS_RewardMultiplier_tooltip:
Scales all currency payouts from missions by this percentage.

200% = double payouts. 50% = half payouts.
Affects recon and delivery rewards.
Range: 25–400. Default: 100
Sandbox_POS_TierIIReputationReq_tooltip:
Reputation needed to unlock Tier II (moderate risk) missions.

Range: 0–5000. Default: 250
Sandbox_POS_TierIIIReputationReq_tooltip:
Reputation needed to unlock Tier III (elevated risk) missions.

Range: 0–5000. Default: 750
Sandbox_POS_TierIVReputationReq_tooltip:
Reputation needed to unlock Tier IV (high risk) missions.

Range: 0–5000. Default: 1500
Sandbox_POS_ExpiryReputationPenalty_tool:
Reputation lost when an accepted operation expires.

Set to 0 to disable expiry penalties.
Range: 0–100. Default: 25
Sandbox_POS_InvestmentRepPerHundred_tool:
Reputation gained per $100 invested when an investment matures successfully.

Defaulted investments apply a minor negative equivalent.
Range: 0–50. Default: 10
Sandbox_POS_WritingDamageChance_tooltip:
Percentage chance that a pen or pencil takes condition damage when crafting field reports.

Set to 0 to disable writing implement wear.
Range: 0–100. Default: 20
Sandbox_POS_WritingDamageAmount_tooltip:
Average condition loss per damage event on writing implements.

Actual loss varies ±2 around this value.
Range: 1–20. Default: 7
Sandbox_POS_EnableNegotiation_tooltip:
When enabled, players can negotiate mission terms (reward, deadline) before accepting.

Success chance is based on reputation tier.
When disabled, missions are accepted at the posted terms.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_NegotiationSuccessBonus_tool:
Flat bonus (or penalty if negative) added to the base negotiation success chance.

Base chances: Tier I = 30%, Tier II = 50%, Tier III = 70%, Tier IV = 85%.
Range: -50 to 50. Default: 0
Sandbox_POS_EnableCancellationPenalty_to:
When enabled, cancelling active missions incurs a reputation penalty scaled by mission tier.

Tier I (low risk) missions are always free to cancel.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_BaseCancelPenalty_tooltip:
Base reputation penalty for cancelling recon operations.

Scaled by tier: Tier II = 0.5x, Tier III = 1.0x, Tier IV = 1.5x.
Set to 0 to remove recon cancel penalties.
Range: 0–200. Default: 30
Sandbox_POS_BaseCancelPenaltyDelivery_to:
Base reputation penalty for cancelling delivery missions.

Doubles if the package has already been picked up.
Set to 0 to remove delivery cancel penalties.
Range: 0–100. Default: 15
Sandbox_POS_TerminalFontSize_tooltip:
Font size for the POSnet terminal display.

1 = Small, 2 = Medium, 3 = Code (monospace), 4 = Large.
Changes take effect on next terminal open.
Range: 1–4. Default: 3 (Code)
Sandbox_POS_TerminalColourTheme_tooltip:
Colour theme for the POSnet terminal display.

1 = Classic Green, 2 = Amber, 3 = Cool White, 4 = IBM Blue.
Changes take effect on next terminal open.
Range: 1–4. Default: 1 (Classic Green)
Sandbox_POS_FontScaleWithWindow_tooltip:
When enabled, the terminal font size adjusts based on window width.

Smaller windows use a smaller font; larger windows use a larger font.
Independent of PZ's global font settings.
Default: OFF
Sandbox_POS_EnableNavPanel_tooltip:
Show the persistent navigation sidebar on the left side of the terminal.

Provides quick access to all terminal sections and displays signal strength.
Disable for a full-width content panel.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_EnableContextPanel_tooltip:
Show the context-sensitive detail panel on the right side of the terminal.

Displays mission details, negotiation chances, and investment info.
Automatically collapses on narrow windows.
Disable for more content width.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_TerminalPowerDrainRate_toolt:
Generator fuel drain rate while the desktop terminal is active (as hundredths of % per real-time minute).

Only applies when grid power is off. Grid power is free.
Set to 0 to disable power drain entirely.
Range: 0–100. Default: 15 (0.15%/min, ~11 hours per full generator)
Sandbox_POS_EnableMarkets_tooltip:
Master toggle for the market intelligence system.

When enabled, players can gather and compile commodity data.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_EnableExchange_tooltip:
Master toggle for the commodity exchange system.

Provides commodity indices, trends, and portfolio tracking.
Currently experimental — disabled by default.
Default: OFF
Sandbox_POS_IntelFreshnessDecayDays_tool:
Number of in-game days before market intel records expire and are purged.

Shorter values force more frequent field reconnaissance.
Range: 3–60. Default: 14
Sandbox_POS_MarketBroadcastInterval_tool:
Time in game-minutes between server market data broadcasts.

Lower values = more frequent market updates.
Range: 30–480. Default: 120
Sandbox_POS_MarketNoteActionTime_tooltip:
Duration of the 'Gather Market Intel' timed action in game ticks.

Lower values = faster note-taking.
Range: 100–600. Default: 300
Sandbox_POS_EnableMarketBroadcasts_toolt:
When enabled, the server periodically broadcasts market intel data to all players.

Broadcast data is lower quality than field-gathered notes.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_MarketBroadcastQuality_toolt:
Quality of server-broadcast market intel (0–100).

Higher values produce more reliable broadcast data.
Field-gathered notes are always higher quality than broadcasts.
Range: 0–100. Default: 50
Sandbox_POS_EnableCategoryWeighting_tool:
When enabled, commodity categories are weighted by importance.

Essential goods (fuel, medicine, food) appear more frequently in broadcasts and intel.
When disabled, all categories are equally likely.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_EnableItemLevelIntel_tooltip:
When enabled, market notes track specific items within categories.

Field notes will contain 1-5 specific items with individual prices.
When disabled, only category-level prices are recorded.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_ItemSelectionPoolSize_toolti:
Number of specific items recorded per field reconnaissance note.

Higher values give more detailed market intelligence per action.
Range: 1-5. Default: 3
Sandbox_POS_BroadcastItemsPerPacket_tool:
Number of specific items included in each market broadcast.

Higher values provide more data but broadcast intel is less accurate than field notes.
Range: 1-5. Default: 2
Sandbox_POS_ReputationAffectsVariance_to:
When enabled, higher reputation tiers produce more accurate price estimates.

Tier 1 (Untrusted): 1.5x variance (wide, inaccurate)
Tier 3 (Trusted): 1.0x (baseline)
Tier 5 (Legendary): 0.6x (very accurate)
When disabled, all players get baseline accuracy.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_DailyPriceDriftPct_tooltip:
Maximum percentage that commodity prices can drift per game day.

Higher values create more volatile markets. 0 = prices never drift.
Drift direction is influenced by supply/demand intel from player reconnaissance.
Range: 0-10. Default: 2
Sandbox_POS_EssentialGoodsPriority_toolt:
When enabled, essential categories (fuel, medicine, food) are broadcast 1.5x more frequently.

This makes survival-critical market data more available to players.
When disabled, all categories broadcast at their base frequency.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_WeightFuel_tooltip:
Selection weight for the Fuel commodity category (divided by 100).

Higher values make fuel appear more often in market data.
150 = 1.5x importance. Range: 10-300. Default: 150
Sandbox_POS_WeightMedicine_tooltip:
Selection weight for the Medicine commodity category (divided by 100).

Higher values make medical supplies appear more often.
140 = 1.4x importance. Range: 10-300. Default: 140
Sandbox_POS_WeightFood_tooltip:
Selection weight for the Food commodity category (divided by 100).

100 = baseline importance. Range: 10-300. Default: 100
Sandbox_POS_WeightAmmunition_tooltip:
Selection weight for the Ammunition commodity category (divided by 100).

130 = 1.3x importance. Range: 10-300. Default: 130
Sandbox_POS_WeightTools_tooltip:
Selection weight for the Tools commodity category (divided by 100).

90 = 0.9x importance. Range: 10-300. Default: 90
Sandbox_POS_WeightRadio_tooltip:
Selection weight for the Radio/Electronics commodity category (divided by 100).

60 = 0.6x importance. Range: 10-300. Default: 60
Sandbox_POS_PortableBatteryDivisor_toolt:
Controls how fast the portable computer battery drains while the terminal is open.

Higher values = slower drain (longer battery life).
1800 = ~50 minutes of use, 3600 = ~100 minutes, 900 = ~25 minutes.
Range: 300-7200. Default: 1800
Sandbox_POS_MaxObservationsPerCategory_t:
Maximum number of market observations retained per commodity category.

Older observations are discarded when this cap is exceeded.
Higher values retain more history but increase world save size.
Range: 12-48. Default: 24
Sandbox_POS_MaxRollingCloses_tooltip:
Maximum number of daily closing prices retained per category and company.

Used for trend calculation and price history charts.
Range: 7-30. Default: 14
Sandbox_POS_MaxGlobalEvents_tooltip:
Maximum number of market events retained in the world event log.

Events include price shocks, wholesaler actions, and supply disruptions.
Range: 50-250. Default: 100
Sandbox_POS_MaxPlayerAlerts_tooltip:
Maximum number of market alerts retained per player.

Older alerts are discarded when this cap is exceeded.
Range: 5-50. Default: 20
Sandbox_POS_EconomyTickEnabled_tooltip:
When enabled, the market economy processes a daily tick that updates prices, aggregates observations, and advances wholesaler behaviour.

Disabling freezes the economy at its current state.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_EnableEventLogs_tooltip:
When enabled, the server writes append-only event logs for market activity.

Useful for debugging, auditing, and admin analysis.
Logs are stored outside the save file and do not affect modData size.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_EventLogRetentionDays_toolti:
Number of in-game days to retain event log files before purging.

Older log files are truncated during the daily economy tick.
Range: 7-90. Default: 30
Sandbox_POS_EnablePassiveRecon_tooltip:
When enabled, recon devices passively scan the environment while carried and equipped.

Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_PassiveReconInterval_tooltip:
Time between passive reconnaissance scans in game seconds.

Lower values scan more frequently but use more battery.
Range: 30-180. Default: 60
Sandbox_POS_CamcorderScanRadius_tooltip:
Passive scan radius for the Recon Camcorder when equipped.

Range: 20-80. Default: 40
Sandbox_POS_LoggerScanRadius_tooltip:
Passive scan radius for the Field Survey Logger when equipped.

Range: 10-50. Default: 25
Sandbox_POS_VHSTapeMinDays_tooltip:
Minimum number of in-game days a VHS tape should last under continuous recording.

Range: 1-7. Default: 3
Sandbox_POS_CamcorderNoiseLevel_tooltip:
Percentage increase to player noise while the camcorder is actively recording.

0 = silent operation. Higher values attract more zombies.
Range: 0-20. Default: 5
Sandbox_POS_TapeDegradationRate_tooltip:
Quality loss applied to a VHS tape each time it is uploaded and erased.

Higher values make tapes wear out faster. 0 = no degradation.
Range: 0-30. Default: 10
Sandbox_POS_CalculatorConfidenceBonus_to:
Passive confidence bonus applied to all recon data when a Data Calculator is in inventory.

Range: 0-15. Default: 5
Sandbox_POS_EnableVHSCrafting_tooltip:
When enabled, players can repair, splice, and improvise VHS tapes from scavenged materials.

Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_EnableForagingTapes_tooltip:
When enabled, damaged VHS tapes and magnetic tape scraps can be found while foraging in urban areas.

Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_IntelCooldownDays_tooltip:
Number of in-game days before the same location can be surveyed again for market intel.

Prevents repeat-farming at the same building.
Approaches but does not exceed the intel freshness decay period.
Range: 3-14. Default: 12
Sandbox_POS_VHSReviewTimePerEntry_toolti:
Duration of each VHS tape entry review at a TV station in game ticks.

300 ticks = ~5 minutes at 1x game speed.
Each entry on the tape requires a separate review action.
Range: 100-600. Default: 300
Sandbox_POS_DangerCheckRadius_tooltip:
Radius in tiles for threat detection when gathering intel or using passive recon devices.

Detects: live zombies, active fires, combat.
Higher values are safer but more restrictive.
Range: 5-30. Default: 15
Sandbox_POS_EnableWatchlist_tooltip:
Allow players to watch commodity categories and receive price alerts.

When disabled, the watchlist screen and watch/unwatch buttons are hidden.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_WatchlistAlertThresholdPct_t:
Percentage price change that triggers a watchlist alert.

A value of 10 means alerts fire when a watched category's average price changes by 10% or more since the last check.
Range: 1-50. Default: 10
Sandbox_POS_EnableDataRecorder_tooltip:
Master toggle for the Data-Recorder passive ingestion system.

When enabled, all passive recon data routes through an equipped Data-Recorder.
When disabled, the recorder item still exists but passive scanning reverts to legacy behaviour.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_RecorderInternalBufferSize_t:
Number of data chunks the recorder can store internally when no media is inserted.

Overflow chunks are lost. Insert media for extended storage.
Range: 4-32. Default: 8
Sandbox_POS_RecorderPowerDrainRate_toolt:
Condition loss per in-game hour while the Data-Recorder is actively recording.

Expressed in hundredths of condition (50 = 0.5 condition per hour).
Range: 10-200. Default: 50
Sandbox_POS_RecorderProcessingTime_toolt:
Duration of each chunk processing action at a POSnet terminal in game ticks.

Lower values = faster processing.
Range: 10-100. Default: 30
Sandbox_POS_EnableMicrocassettes_tooltip:
When enabled, microcassette tapes appear in loot and can be used with the Data-Recorder.

High-fidelity medium (+1000 BPS confidence). 10 entries per tape.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_EnableFloppyDisks_tooltip:
When enabled, floppy disks appear in loot and can be used with the Data-Recorder.

Digital precision (+2000 BPS confidence). 40 entries per disk. Extremely rare.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_FloppyCorruptionChance_toolt:
Percentage chance that a worn floppy disk corrupts irreparably on each review cycle.

Set to 0 for indestructible floppies.
Range: 0-50. Default: 15
Sandbox_POS_MicrocassetteMaxRewinds_tool:
Maximum number of times a microcassette can be rewound for reuse.

After reaching this limit, the tape becomes spent and must be recycled.
Range: 1-5. Default: 1
Sandbox_POS_EnableCameraWorkstation_tool:
Master toggle for the Camera Workstation intelligence compilation system.

When disabled, camera furniture context menus are hidden.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_CameraCompileTime_tooltip:
Duration of the Compile Site Survey timed action in seconds.

Range: 120-600. Default: 300
Sandbox_POS_CameraTapeReviewTime_tooltip:
Duration of the Review Recorded Tape timed action in seconds.

Range: 60-400. Default: 200
Sandbox_POS_CameraBulletinTime_tooltip:
Duration of the Produce Market Bulletin timed action in seconds.

Range: 180-900. Default: 450
Sandbox_POS_CameraCompileCooldownHours_t:
Cooldown between Compile Site Survey actions at the same workstation.

0 = no cooldown.
Range: 0-48. Default: 6
Sandbox_POS_CameraTapeReviewCooldownHour:
Cooldown between Review Recorded Tape actions at the same workstation.

0 = no cooldown.
Range: 0-48. Default: 4
Sandbox_POS_CameraBulletinCooldownHours_:
Cooldown between Produce Market Bulletin actions at the same workstation.

0 = no cooldown.
Range: 0-48. Default: 12
Sandbox_POS_CameraConfidenceMultiplier_t:
Percentage modifier applied to all camera compilation confidence bonuses.

100 = standard, 200 = double bonuses, 50 = half.
Range: 50-200. Default: 100
Sandbox_POS_CameraLocationBonusEnabled_t:
When enabled, compiling at media buildings (TV studios, broadcast rooms) grants a confidence bonus.

Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_CameraBulletinRepBonus_toolt:
Reputation bonus (in hundredths) awarded for producing a Market Bulletin.

50 = +0.50 reputation.
Range: 0-200. Default: 50
Sandbox_POS_EnableSIGINTSkill_tooltip:
Master toggle for the Signal Intelligence perk.

When disabled, the SIGINT skill is not registered and all level-based modifiers are inactive.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_SIGINTXPMultiplier_tooltip:
Global multiplier for all SIGINT XP gains.

100 = standard, 200 = double XP, 50 = half XP.
Range: 25-400. Default: 100
Sandbox_POS_SIGINTNoiseReduction_tooltip:
How aggressively SIGINT skill reduces noise in analysis outputs.

1 = None, 2 = Low, 3 = Standard, 4 = High.
Default: 3 (Standard)
Sandbox_POS_SIGINTTimeReduction_tooltip:
When enabled, higher SIGINT levels reduce Terminal Analysis processing time.

Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_SIGINTCrossCorrelationLevel_:
Minimum SIGINT level required to unlock cross-correlation during Terminal Analysis.

Cross-correlation detects emergent patterns across diverse inputs.
Range: 3-10. Default: 6
Sandbox_POS_SIGINTConfidenceBonus_toolti:
Scaling of the per-level confidence bonus from SIGINT skill.

1 = None, 2 = Low, 3 = Standard, 4 = High.
Default: 3 (Standard)
Sandbox_POS_SIGINTTraitsEnabled_tooltip:
When enabled, SIGINT-related traits appear at character creation.

Includes Analytical Mind, Radio Hobbyist, Systems Thinker (positive) and Impatient, Disorganised Thinker, Signal Blindness (negative).
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_SIGINTBookSpawns_tooltip:
When enabled, SIGINT skill books appear in world loot (libraries, military bases, electronics stores).

Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_EnableTerminalAnalysis_toolt:
Master toggle for the Process Intelligence action at POSnet terminals.

When disabled, the analysis screen and action are hidden.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_AnalysisBaseTime_tooltip:
Base duration of the Process Intelligence timed action in seconds.

Reduced by SIGINT skill when time reduction is enabled.
Range: 60-600. Default: 180
Sandbox_POS_AnalysisMaxInputs_tooltip:
Maximum number of raw intel items that can be processed in a single analysis action.

More inputs = more XP and better output chances.
Range: 1-10. Default: 5
Sandbox_POS_AnalysisJunkChance_tooltip:
Base percentage chance of junk output at SIGINT Level 0.

Reduced by SIGINT noise filter at higher levels.
Range: 0-80. Default: 40
Sandbox_POS_AnalysisSatelliteBonus_toolt:
When enabled, a linked satellite dish enhances Terminal Analysis with bonus confidence, tier upgrade chance, and reduced cross-correlation requirements.

Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_AnalysisCooldownMinutes_tool:
Cooldown between Process Intelligence actions at the same terminal.

0 = no cooldown.
Range: 0-120. Default: 30
Sandbox_POS_AnalysisDiversityBonus_toolt:
When enabled, using inputs from diverse sources and categories grants a confidence bonus.

Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_EnableSatelliteUplink_toolti:
Master toggle for satellite dish interactions.

When disabled, satellite dish context menus are hidden.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_SatelliteBroadcastCooldownHo:
Cooldown between broadcasts at the same satellite dish.

0 = no cooldown.
Range: 0-72. Default: 24
Sandbox_POS_SatelliteBroadcastStrength_t:
Percentage modifier on broadcast market impact.

100 = standard, 200 = double impact, 25 = quarter impact.
Range: 25-200. Default: 100
Sandbox_POS_SatelliteBroadcastRepBonus_t:
Percentage modifier on reputation gained from satellite broadcasts.

100 = standard, 200 = double rep.
Range: 0-300. Default: 100
Sandbox_POS_SatellitePowerDrain_tooltip:
When enabled, satellite calibration and broadcasts drain extra generator fuel.

Calibration: 5% fuel, Broadcast: 10% fuel.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_SatelliteCalibrationRequired:
When enabled, satellite dishes must be calibrated before first use.

When disabled, all dishes are always operational.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_SatelliteCalibrationTime_too:
Duration of the satellite dish calibration timed action in seconds.

Range: 60-600. Default: 300
Sandbox_POS_SatelliteLinkRange_tooltip:
Maximum tile range for the satellite-to-terminal link.

Terminal must be within this range of a calibrated dish for enhancement bonuses.
Range: 20-100. Default: 50
Sandbox_POS_SatelliteMarketCoupling_tool:
When enabled, satellite broadcasts cause price propagation in the regional market economy.

Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_SatelliteDecalibrationDays_t:
Days without power before a calibrated dish requires recalibration.

0 = dishes never decalibrate once set up.
Range: 0-30. Default: 7
Sandbox_POS_EnableTutorialHints_tooltip:
When enabled, progressive tutorial toasts and popups guide the player through POSnet features as they reach each milestone.

Disable for experienced players.
Default: ON
Sandbox_POS_EnableLivingMarket_tooltip:
Enable the autonomous Living Market economy simulation. When active, market agents generate observations, wholesalers influence regional supply and prices, and economic events occur independently of player actions.

This is an experimental feature under active development.
Default: OFF
Sandbox_POS_SimulationTickInterval_toolt:
In-game minutes between Living Market simulation ticks. Lower values produce a more responsive economy but increase server load.

Only effective when Living Market is enabled.
Range: 5-120. Default: 20
Sandbox_POS_MarketFileChunkSize_tooltip:
Number of market categories to serialise per game-minute when saving market data to disk. Lower values spread I/O over more ticks, reducing frame spikes. Higher values save faster but may cause brief stutters.

Range: 1-20. Default: 4
